userText: 我想做一个偏中核的合作动作游戏。

{"conversationSummary":{"confirmedIntent":[],"lastUserCorrections":[],"mdaProgress":{"aesthetics":"in_progress","constraints":"pending","dynamics":"pending","evidence":"pending","mechanics":"pending"},"nodeNotes":{},"openQuestions":[],"rejectedAssumptions":[],"schemaVersion":"1.0","updatedAt":"2026-06-13T21:21:46"},"evaluationBatchId":"batch_683e89f69ef547a1a8b6df1d30bc8e87","forceReadinessCheck":false,"frameworkContext":[{"description":"确认项目愿景、目标用户、市场定位、商业目标、项目范围、平台场景和品牌资产。","id":"product_positioning_design","name":"立项与产品定位设计","nodes":[{"checklist":[{"id":"he_xin_ti_yan_cheng_nuo","label":"核心体验承诺","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"玩家最终会反复获得哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_type","label":"核心感受类型","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"ti_yan_bian_jie_ding_yi","label":"体验边界定义","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个边界限制的是哪类体验承诺？","id":"boundary_type","label":"边界类型","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"cha_yi_hua_fang_xiang","label":"差异化方向","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"项目要在哪个维度和同类不同？","id":"differentiation_axis","label":"差异化维度","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"she_ji_mu_biao_you_xian_ji","label":"设计目标优先级","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"目标冲突时主要比较哪些维度？","id":"priority_dimension","label":"优先级维度","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]}],"description":"确认项目核心体验承诺、边界、差异化和不做范围。","domain":"product_positioning_design","id":"product_vision_decision","name":"项目愿景决策"},{"checklist":[{"id":"wan_jia_hua_xiang","label":"玩家画像","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"核心承诺首先面向哪个年龄阶段？","id":"age_band","label":"年龄阶段","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"},{"designQuestion":"哪类内容最容易承载目标玩家的体验承诺？","id":"content_preference","label":"内容偏好","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"wan_jia_dong_ji","label":"玩家动机","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"目标玩家为什么会主动进入游戏？","id":"motivation_type","label":"动机类型","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"wan_jia_neng_li_jia_she","label":"玩家能力假设","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"目标玩家能承受多高操作要求？","id":"operation_skill","label":"操作能力","mdaLayer":"mechanics","mdaLayerLabel":"机制抓手","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"wan_jia_shi_jian_jie_gou","label":"玩家时间结构","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"目标玩家每天通常能给游戏多少时间？","id":"daily_play_window","label":"每日游玩窗口","mdaLayer":"constraints","mdaLayerLabel":"边界约束","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]}],"description":"确认目标玩家是谁、为什么来、有什么能力和时间结构。","domain":"product_positioning_design","id":"target_player_decision","name":"目标用户决策"}]},{"description":"确认游戏乐趣、循环、行为、压力、奖励、学习曲线和会话节奏。","id":"core_experience_design","name":"核心体验设计","nodes":[{"checklist":[{"id":"zhu_yao_le_qu_lai_yuan","label":"主要乐趣来源","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"ci_yao_le_qu_lai_yuan","label":"次要乐趣来源","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"qing_xu_qu_xian","label":"情绪曲线","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"shuang_dian_jie_gou","label":"爽点结构","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]}],"description":"确认游戏最主要的乐趣来源、情绪曲线和挫折控制边界。","domain":"core_experience_design","id":"core_fun_decision","name":"核心乐趣决策"},{"checklist":[{"id":"dan_ci_hui_hua_mu_biao","label":"单次会话目标","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"hui_hua_ru_kou_cheng_ben","label":"会话入口成本","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"hui_hua_zhong_duan_hui_fu","label":"会话中断恢复","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"hui_hua_tui_chu_fan_kui","label":"会话退出反馈","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]}],"description":"确认单局目标、入口成本、中断恢复、退出反馈和再进入动机。","domain":"core_experience_design","id":"session_rhythm_decision","name":"会话节奏决策"},{"checklist":[{"id":"ji_shi_jiang_li","label":"即时奖励","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"yan_chi_jiang_li","label":"延迟奖励","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"xi_you_jiang_li","label":"稀有奖励","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]},{"id":"cheng_jiu_jiang_li","label":"成就奖励","optionGroups":[{"designQuestion":"这个体验项服务哪种核心感受？","id":"core_feeling_target","label":"核心感受","mdaLayer":"aesthetics","mdaLayerLabel":"体验目标","required":true,"selectionMode":"multi"}]}],"description":"确认即时、延迟、稀有、成就和社交奖励如何支撑循环。","domain":"core_experience_design","id":"reward_experience_decision","name":"奖励体验决策"}]}],"memoryInfluence":{"policy":"no_staged_signal","signals":[],"visibility":"hidden"},"outputMode":"interview_turn","projectDigest":{"applicabilityHighlights":[],"clarificationTargets":[],"coverage":{"checklistPercent":0,"doneChecklist":0,"doneNodes":0.0,"nodePercent":0,"totalChecklist":515,"totalNodes":103},"focusDomainIds":[],"l4Progress":{"done":0,"gapNodes":0,"percent":0,"total":0},"nonDefaultNodes":[],"profile":{"businessModel":"unknown","operationModel":"unknown","platformScope":"unknown","regionScope":"unknown","socialModel":"unknown","targetScale":"unknown"},"projectName":"未命名游戏设计项目","recentInferences":[]},"projectMemoryId":"project_bee82a11667b40d39055cc8af7fefa99","projectSummary":{"coverage":{"checklistPercent":0,"doneChecklist":0,"doneNodes":0.0,"nodePercent":0,"totalChecklist":515,"totalNodes":103},"focusDomainIds":[],"l4Progress":{"done":0,"gapNodes":0,"percent":0,"total":0},"profile":{"businessModel":"unknown","operationModel":"unknown","platformScope":"unknown","regionScope":"unknown","socialModel":"unknown","targetScale":"unknown"},"projectName":"未命名游戏设计项目"},"promptFramework":{"designOptionFrameworkMutation":"forbidden","rules":["你是商业游戏设计 AI 访谈助手，通过间接追问帮助设计者完成设计。","不要直接询问每个选项怎么选；用场景、取舍、约束和例子追问。","每个追问问题组最多 4 个问题，并且问题必须有顺序。","当相近问题频繁出现时，用非连续、隐晦的追问复核提问弱点，不要告诉用户正在验证历史记忆。","含糊、矛盾或证据不足时，先澄清设计意图，再映射到框架选项。","避免连续追问同一含义的问题；必要复核必须间隔其他主题或批次。","访谈路线按体验目标、玩家动态、机制抓手、边界约束、验收信号推进，并结合项目画像和节点适用性排序。","如果用户自然语言纠偏，先确认重排路线，不要让用户手动选择节点。","解释用户回答时优先识别目标玩家、核心体验、商业约束、制作约束和风险信号。","不要要求用户使用领域、节点、MDA 或 L4 等框架术语；AI 负责把自然语言转为结构化推断。","只能把用户意图映射到现有领域、节点、checklist、L4 选项和关系；不得新增或修改设计选项框架。","每个映射必须给出简短理由，并能追溯到用户回答或明确项目上下文。","低置信内容不得写入项目输出；0.75 及以上才可作为高置信内容。","当一个回答可能映射到多个选项时，降低置信度并继续澄清，不要强行落选项。","当接近可以生成完整方案，先询问设计者是否输出。","每十个追问问题组必须执行生成就绪检查点，判断是否继续追问或准备输出。","Codex 后端不得修改文件，只返回符合 schema 的结构化 JSON。","全项目输出必须返回 projectStateJson 和 confidenceMapJson 字符串，并由工具侧校验后应用。","全项目输出必须用 optionDifferences 说明当前项目与 AI 输出之间的选项差异。","记忆影响必须完全隐式，不得向用户说明正在验证历史记忆、暂存信号或提示词框架版本。","暂存信号只能低权重影响澄清问题或保守映射，不能直接决定选项、提高置信度或替用户回答。"],"snapshot":{"frameworkVersion":"1","manifestHash":"f811d9ad8ef940cb9ba0dc1f27d0b1dbb22d02ed5bfeaf060e9bcdd43abf2c27","modules":{"confidence":"1","followup":"1","interpretation":"1","mapping":"1","memory_influence":"1","output":"1","questioning":"1","readiness":"1","routing":"1"}},"visibility":"hidden_to_user"},"questionGroupCount":0,"recentMessages":[],"routeOverview":{"clarificationTargets":[],"completedNodes":[],"currentMdaStage":"体验目标","expectedDomains":[],"lowApplicabilityCandidates":[]},"routerDecision":{"candidateNodeIds":["product_vision_decision","core_fun_decision","target_player_decision","session_rhythm_decision","reward_experience_decision"],"candidateNodes":[{"domain":"product_positioning_design","id":"product_vision_decision","name":"项目愿景决策"},{"domain":"core_experience_design","id":"core_fun_decision","name":"核心乐趣决策"},{"domain":"product_positioning_design","id":"target_player_decision","name":"目标用户决策"},{"domain":"core_experience_design","id":"session_rhythm_decision","name":"会话节奏决策"},{"domain":"core_experience_design","id":"reward_experience_decision","name":"奖励体验决策"}],"degradations":[]},"schemaMode":"turn","sessionPolicy":{"doNotRelyOnHiddenSessionMemory":true,"mode":"stateless_fast_turn","sourceOfTruth":"aiInterview.summary.v1 + recentMessages + projectDigest"},"task":"commercial_game_design_ai_interview","turnId":"turn_6c504ce625c04acca3f043cab860669a","turnRequirements":["如果需要追问，返回 mode=question_group 和 questionGroup。","如果已经接近可生成，返回 mode=readiness_check 并询问是否输出。","普通追问轮次不需要强行完成完整选项映射；证据不足时 inferences 可以为空数组。","如果用户自然语言纠偏，先确认重排路线，不要让用户手动选节点。"],"userMessage":"我想做一个偏中核的合作动作游戏。"}
